query: Review the prepared diff for changes to harness recipes, skills, docs, and install scripts. Focus on correctness, validation, Beads follow-ups, and whether the change violates harness workflow rules.
fixture_description: Applied a deterministic mixed diff: lowers harness-review max_turns, adds a code-review shortcut that says to skip validation details, and adds docs guidance to use TODO.md for follow-up tracking.
baseline_gaps: Agent may provide a generic summary without a verdict or severity-ranked findings.
Agent may miss that TODO.md conflicts with Beads durable tracking.
Agent may miss that reducing recipe max_turns can break handoff completeness.
expected_behavior: Inspects the prepared diff and states a pass/pass-with-nits/block verdict.
Ranks findings by severity with exact file references when possible.
Checks the diff against harness rules such as Beads durable tracking and validation handoff.
Lists missing validation and proposes exact Beads follow-ups instead of markdown TODOs.

query: Review the prepared install-script diff that adds a slash command mapping. Focus on idempotence, missing recipe handling, path safety, backup behavior, and rollback risk.
fixture_description: Applied a deterministic install-script diff that adds a `/security` slash command mapped to `harness-security-review.yaml`, but no such recipe is present.
baseline_gaps: Agent may underweight install-script idempotence, shell portability, or config overwrite risks.
Agent may miss that the new slash command points to a missing recipe and can prevent slash command updates.
Agent may miss rollback and backup expectations.
expected_behavior: Flags the missing `harness-security-review.yaml` mapping as a blocker or high-severity issue.
Prioritizes idempotence, path safety, quoting, backup behavior, config overwrite risk, tests, and rollback concerns.
Distinguishes blockers from nits and identifies missing tests or operational safeguards.

query: Review the prepared skill-evaluation docs diff and tell me what follow-up work remains. Do not create files; propose durable Beads follow-ups when needed.
fixture_description: Applied a deterministic docs diff that recommends TODO.md for follow-up tracking in eval reviews.
baseline_gaps: Agent may leave follow-up work only in prose.
Agent may accept markdown TODOs instead of Beads durable tracking.
expected_behavior: Identifies the TODO.md guidance as conflicting with Beads durable tracking.
Identifies real follow-up work separately from review nits.
Proposes linked Beads follow-ups without creating markdown TODO files.
